title: Add offline session spawn dry-run JSON
goal: Add the next issue #4 headless runtime slice: `jcode-harness session spawn <goal> --dry-run --json`, a safe envelope for creating a new jcode run/session without executing providers.
requiredInputs: Existing jcode-harness run and jcode run CLI envelopes
permissions: Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: Command emits a stable, read-only, not-executed argv/cwd envelope for creating a new jcode run/session
Omitting `--dry-run` fails safely without starting provider/TUI
Focused e2e, fmt/check, selfdev build, commit and push pass
verificationCommands: target/debug/jcode-harness session spawn "fixture goal" --dry-run --json | python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null
failureTaxonomy: Accidentally starting provider/TUI during spawn dry-run
Ambiguous relationship between harness run and jcode run argv
Leaking task prompt content in unsafe places beyond explicit requested goal
notes: Keep actual spawn execution unsupported in this slice. This command only returns a stable plan/envelope for external orchestrators.
